---
title: " "
listing:
  contents: uci-projects-portfolio
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: true
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-profile">
    <div class="avatar-wrapper">
      <img src="profile.jpg" class="avatar-photo" alt="Jinrui Zhang">
    </div>
    <h2 class="hero-name">Jinrui (Jerry) Zhang</h2>
    <p class="hero-subtitle">Data Analyst &middot; Business Intelligence &middot; Machine Learning</p>
    <div class="hero-links">
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/jinrui-zhang-jerry/" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>
      <a href="https://github.com/jerryzhang966" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-deco">
    <div class="petal p1"></div>
    <div class="petal p2"></div>
    <div class="petal p3"></div>
    <div class="petal p4"></div>
    <div class="petal p5"></div>
  </div>
</section>
```

::: {.project-cta}
Browse my projects below &mdash; **click any card to read the full case study**
:::
